value.description: Claude Code saves every conversation as a local transcript, letting you resume the most recent session with `--continue`, pick any past session via `--resume` (opens an interactive picker), or resume by name, session ID, or linked PR number with `--resume <name|id>` or `--from-pr <number>`. From inside an active session, `/resume` lets you switch to a different conversation or branch it to try a different approach.
value.label: --continue / --resume / /resume
